things.name: Dunnottar Castle
things.description: Dramatic ruined clifftop fortress 15 miles south of Aberdeen, backdrop for many films

things.name: Aberdeen Art Gallery
things.description: Newly refurbished gallery with an outstanding collection including Impressionist works

things.name: Marischal College
things.description: Stunning silver granite building and one of the world's largest granite structures

things.name: Maritime Museum
things.description: Free museum charting Aberdeen's seafaring and North Sea oil heritage

things.name: Duthie Park
things.description: Expansive park featuring the renowned David Welch Winter Gardens

things.name: Union Street
things.description: Historic granite mile with shops, bars and stunning Victorian architecture

things.name: Footdee Village
things.description: Picturesque 19th-century fishing village at the mouth of the River Dee

things.name: Royal Deeside
things.description: Spectacular valley leading to Balmoral Castle and the heart of Scotland

things.name: Aberdeen Beach
things.description: Two-mile sandy beach with an amusement park and leisure facilities

things.name: St Machar's Cathedral
things.description: 14th-century cathedral with a remarkable heraldic ceiling in Old Aberdeen
